name: Boiled String Beans with Ham
recipeIngredient: 1 bone from a smoked ham or
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the ham bone in a 6-quart pot with enough water to fill halfway. Bring to boiling, then reduce heat to a simmer and cover.
2. Simmer for 45 minutes.
3. Prepare the beans while the bone is simmering. Snap off the stem end from each bean and gently pull along the length of the bean to remove the string (it may not be necessary for very young beans). Rinse the beans in a colander under cold running water, then drain.
4. Add the rinsed beans, salt, pepper, and sugar to the pot. Simmer until very tender, up to 30 minutes for old tough beans or about 15 minutes for very tender young beans. Check seasoning halfway through cooking and adjust if needed.
5. Remove the ham bone and drain the beans before serving hot.
